name: platty-mcp
description: Platty MCP retrieval, Figma evidence, impact, memory, and SDD handoff skills for configured context servers.

interface.shortDescription: Platty MCP retrieval, Figma evidence, and SDD handoffs
interface.longDescription: Use Platty MCP skills for read-only retrieval and impact analysis against configured remote Platty context, revisioned Figma evidence reports, memory lifecycle requests, and local SDD handoffs that write prd.md, user_stories.md, and system_design.md before generating approval-gated tasks.md, without running local CLI lifecycle commands.
defaultPrompt: Search and answer from my configured Platty MCP context.
With a Figma URL or 기획서 request, inspect the current service via Platty MCP, save prd.md and user_stories.md, then stop.
Use figma_handoff.json in new design sessions; align approved PRD with Figma, then draft system_design.md.
